g.onclick: sendPrompt('Describe the CE Survey data pipeline in detail')
sendPrompt('How do you generate synthetic merchants from CE Survey data?')
sendPrompt('What does the training dataset look like after processing?')
sendPrompt('Explain the DistilBERT categorization model training in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the XGBoost trend detection model training in detail')
sendPrompt('How does the categorization model serve predictions in real time?')
sendPrompt('How are model outputs shown to users in Firefly III?')
sendPrompt('How does the feedback collection work?')
sendPrompt('How does the retraining pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('What are the promotion gates for new models?')
sendPrompt('How does model versioning and rollback work?')
sendPrompt('What is the Chameleon Cloud deployment architecture?')
sendPrompt('What monitoring and drift detection is in place?')

svg.text: Click any box to explore that component in detail
Dashed lines show the continuous feedback and redeployment loop
